caption: A man wearing a grey wig styled into a high peak, glasses, a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie, and tan suspenders is seated in a studio setting. He wears over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a professional microphone. To his right, a child in a navy blue long-sleeved shirt stands near a black chair. The background consists of a wall covered in numerous framed photographs and some hanging clothing, including a yellow garment with the word "LEE" visible. On-screen graphics featuring a logo and the text "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" appear in the lower corners. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his facial expression from a neutral look to speaking, opening his mouth slightly toward the end. The child remains in the background, leaning against the chair throughout the scene.
